race.comment: AUSTRALASIA (13) has been thereabouts since getting off the mark here four runs back. Drops back in trip off a 50-day freshen and is drawn to get all the favours from the inside alley. Ready to strike again. AMAYA'S SECRET (7) is desperate to break through, just missing in her last two. Gets in well with the claim and is in the mix. JEWELS STATEMENT (3) gave backers a bold sight fresh but was run down by a better one late. Is sure to have come on from that and will prove tougher to reel in with that run under her belt. BACK ON DE QUO (11) returns and is one of the main pain influences. Boasts a strong record over this track and trip and is well placed to make a bright return. Have to include.
